item.title: Booey's Gourmet LLC: Booey's Dragon's Breath sauce, 15.2oz ringneck glass bottle. Recall
item.product: Booey's Dragon's Breath sauce, 15.2oz ringneck glass bottle.
item.summary: Ingredients statement declares Anchovy and Sasame, but Contains statement does not declare Fish (Anchovy) and Sesame. Product details: Booey's Dragon's Breath sauce, 15.2oz ringneck glass bottle. UPC on bottle: 7 01936 29222 3. There are 12 bottles per case. Manufactured Exclusively for BOOEYS GOURMET 3924 N. Cannon St. Spokane, WA 99205. Label declares: INGREDIENTS: Contains Soy and Wheat. *...
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
